subject: GPT-5.5 is 50% off in Windsurf and Devin
body:
We've partnered with **OpenAI** to offer **GPT-5.5** at **50% off** in **Windsurf and Devin** through May 14.

During this promotional period, GPT-5.5 will draw down user quota and charge overage at **half the rate** in Windsurf. In Devin, users will see significantly reduced costs when using the preview agent powered by GPT-5.5; we expect this agent to get almostВ **twice as much work done per dollar spent**.

GPT-5.5 has been available in both products since launch, and it's set a new bar for what's possible. InВ **Windsurf**, it's a giant leap forward for handling ambiguity: GPT-5.5 excels at understanding intent, reasoning through complexity, and executing tasks with minimal back-and-forth.

InВ **Devin**, it runs longer and more autonomously than any GPT model we've tested, surfacing bugs no other model can catch and investigating and fixing production issues end-to-end.

We can't wait to see what you build!


900 Villa St, 94041, Mountain View

This email was sent toВ denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com
